underlying_goal: Fix and maintain a Vercel-deployed Next.js web app (omega-sovereign), including styling fixes, CSP updates, microphone permissions, and general project health
friction_detail: Claude ran a health check but didn't acknowledge the existing Vercel app context, prompting user frustration ('what are you talking about').
brief_summary: User needed their Vercel app fixed (missing Tailwind, CSP issues, mic permissions) and Claude diagnosed and resolved each issue, with one moment of contextual confusion.
